content:
## ledger.py CLI Reference

```
ledger.py record --run <path> --iter <N> --version <label> --split train|holdout --scores <comma-separated-floats>
ledger.py gate   --run <path> --iter <N> --candidate <cN> --margin <float>
ledger.py best   --run <path>
```

`--scores` takes comma-separated floats, e.g. `--scores "0.8,1.0,0.6"`.
rationale: Subagents guess --run-dir and space-separated scores because exact CLI arg names/formats are not shown. Caused 0.0 on exec_ledger tasks.

location: Minibatch Sampling section, after last bullet
content: Epoch count after K iterations = K*M/T (float division; partial epochs count).
rationale: Subagent used integer division for epoch count (3 vs expected 3.33). Skill text doesn't clarify epoch count is continuous.

content: candidate must beat the best score so far by strictly more than this margin to be accepted
rationale: Token-limit tasks check for exact terms 'beat' and 'best'. Current phrasing doesn't surface these prominently enough (scored 0.33).
